rationale: The score is identical (6/10) and the justification text is verbatim the same across both versions. Strengths and concerns are reworded paraphrases that carry the same substantive meaning ('Lack of direct experience in industrial automation' vs 'Limited direct experience in industrial automation'; 'Not directly familiar with IEC 62443' vs 'Lack of specific experience with IEC 62443'). These are within ordinary run-to-run wording noise and none of the changes key off the Berlin-to-São Paulo location change.
